project.name: AUROS
project.coingeckoRequestType: Others — RWA analytics / comparator platform (no native token)

descriptions.shortEn: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.
descriptions.shortFr: Plateforme B2B de tokenisation RWA et comparateur ouvert agrégant 120+ produits tokenisés — obligations, stablecoins, immobilier, crédit privé et matières premières — avec APY/TVL live via DeFiLlama et catalogue émetteurs.
descriptions.longEn: AUROS helps issuers structure real-world asset tokenization with a jurisdiction-first workflow (8 hubs compared) and a free asset admission wizard. The /compare hub is an independent RWA yield comparator covering stablecoins & treasury, tokenized bonds, real estate, private credit and commodities — aggregating DeFiLlama yields hourly and manual catalog entries for products not yet indexed. Educational content only; not investment advice.
descriptions.defillamaSupportTicketSubject: List AUROS as RWA comparator / data partner (aggregator reference)
descriptions.defillamaSupportTicketBody:
Hello DeFiLlama team,

We operate AUROS (https://getauros.com), a B2B real-world asset tokenization platform with a public RWA yield comparator at https://getauros.com/compare.

We already consume the DeFiLlama Yields API (yields.llama.fi/pools) hourly to surface live APY/TVL for 40+ indexed RWA protocols across stablecoins, bonds, private credit and commodities, combined with our curated catalog (~48 manual entries, 120+ products deduplicated on the hub).

We would like to be listed as an RWA comparator / Services reference (similar to analytics/index tools), with a backlink to our compare hub. AUROS does not custody user funds and has no on-chain TVL to report — we are an aggregator and issuer onboarding tool, not a DeFi protocol.

Suggested listing:
- Name: AUROS
- URL: https://getauros.com
- Compare hub: https://getauros.com/compare
- Category: Services (RWA comparator)
- Description: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.
- Logo: https://getauros.com/auros-logo.svg
- GitHub: (open-source repo if applicable)
- Contact: adrien.balitrand@gmail.com

Happy to provide additional proof of domain ownership or adjust copy. Thank you for powering our live yield data.

catalog.note: Compare hub /compare deduplicates and merges live pools; expect 120+ at runtime.

defillama.strategy: Primary: support ticket (no on-chain TVL). Optional: defillama-server data2.ts metadata PR if team accepts Services listing without adapter.

prForm.name: AUROS
prForm.currentTvl: $0 — comparator platform; aggregates third-party RWA yields, no custody
prForm.shortDescription: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.
prForm.implementationDetails: Hourly fetch of yields.llama.fi/pools; filtered RWA project slugs in lib/comparators/*.config.ts
prForm.methodology: Not applicable — AUROS does not report its own TVL. Compare hub surfaces aggregated third-party pool APY/TVL.

data2Draft.note: AUROS has no on-chain TVL. Prefer support ticket before adapter PR. If team accepts Services listing without module, append object below to data2.ts.

entry.name: AUROS
entry.description: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.

prChecklist: Upload 512×512 logo to DefiLlama icons bucket (icons.llamao.fi) as auros.png
Explain in PR body: comparator/aggregator, no TVL — reference listing only
If rejected, use defillama.com/support ticket with DEFILLAMA_SUPPORT_TICKET body

coingecko.strategy: No native token — use Partner Portal Others or support ticket for RWA comparator/platform reference.

formFields.description: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.
formFields.additionalInfo: AUROS is not a tradable token. We request a project/platform reference listing or ecosystem tag pointing to our RWA comparator (https://getauros.com/compare) and B2B tokenization tools. We aggregate public yield data including CoinGecko-listed RWA protocols. Machine-readable catalog: https://getauros.com/ai-first/index.json.

rwaXyz.strategy: Partners portal (partners.rwa.xyz) — Protocol listing for B2B platform; company email required. Email team@rwa.xyz if @getauros.com not ready.

formFields.networksReferenced: Multi-chain (aggregates Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, and others via indexed RWA protocols)
assetClassesCovered: U.S. & non-U.S. government debt / tokenized bonds
formFields.shortDescription: B2B RWA tokenization platform and open comparator aggregating 120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit and commodities — with live APY/TVL from DeFiLlama plus curated issuer data.
formFields.longDescription: AUROS helps issuers structure real-world asset tokenization with a jurisdiction-first workflow (8 hubs compared) and a free asset admission wizard. The /compare hub is an independent RWA yield comparator covering stablecoins & treasury, tokenized bonds, real estate, private credit and commodities — aggregating DeFiLlama yields hourly and manual catalog entries for products not yet indexed. Educational content only; not investment advice. Public API at https://getauros.com/developers: MiCA readiness scoring (0–100), jurisdiction ranking across 8 regulatory hubs, compliance checklists, and a paginated RWA product catalog. Python SDK on PyPI (auros-protocol). AUROS does not custody funds, issue tokens, or report on-chain TVL — we are an independent comparator and B2B issuer onboarding platform.
differentiators: Open RWA yield comparator at /compare — 120+ products, hourly DeFiLlama APY/TVL + curated catalog
MiCA intelligence API — static rules, <200ms, no LLM (indicative only)
Jurisdiction-first tokenization wizard for issuers (8 hubs compared)
formFields.submissionNotes: AUROS is not an asset issuer. We request a Directory listing as a Protocol/platform (B2B tokenization + analytics) or Infrastructure & Service Provider. No smart contracts or TVL to index — please link our compare hub and developer API. Happy to provide domain verification.

emailOutreach.subject: Directory listing request — AUROS (RWA comparator & B2B tokenization platform)
emailOutreach.body:
Hello RWA.xyz team,

We would like AUROS listed in the RWA.xyz Directory as a tokenization platform / infrastructure provider (not an asset issuer).

About AUROS
- Website: https://getauros.com
- RWA yield comparator: https://getauros.com/compare (120+ tokenized products — bonds, stablecoins, real estate, private credit, commodities)
- Developer API: https://getauros.com/developers — MiCA readiness scoring, jurisdiction ranking, compliance checklists, product catalog
- Logo: https://getauros.com/auros-logo.svg

AUROS helps issuers structure RWA tokenization with a jurisdiction-first workflow (8 hubs compared) and operates an independent open comparator aggregating DeFiLlama yields hourly plus a curated catalog. We do not custody user funds, issue tokens, or have on-chain TVL.

Suggested listing type: Protocol (platform) or Infrastructure & Service Provider.

Contact: Adrien Balitrand — please reply to this thread; our Partners portal login requires a company email (@getauros.com) which we are finalizing.

Thank you,
Adrien Balitrand
AUROS — https://getauros.com

manualChecklist.detail: SVG at public/auros-logo.svg (live). Export 512×512 PNG to public/auros-logo.png for DeFiLlama icons bucket.
Update data/listings/auros-listing.ts social.twitter / linkedin / github, then re-run npm run listings:generate.
Paste subject + body from generated submission-payload.json → defillama.supportTicket
If support directs you to PR, use defillama-data2-entry.json draft.
Log in → Request & Listing → Others; paste coingecko.formFields from payload.
If partner form lacks comparator category, use support ticket with same copy.
Sign in with @getauros.com (personal domains blocked). Add New Company → Listing Type: Protocol. Paste rwaXyz.formFields from submission-payload.json.
If no company email yet, send rwaXyz.emailOutreach (subject + body) to team@rwa.xyz from getauros.com address.

listing.name: AUROS Protocol
listing.description: The RWA Intelligence Layer — score MiCA readiness (0–100), browse 120+ tokenized RWA products, rank jurisdictions, and generate compliance checklists. Static rules, <200ms, no LLM. Indicative only.
listing.shortDescription: MiCA scoring, RWA catalog, jurisdiction ranking & compliance checklists for tokenized assets.

endpoints.name: Score
endpoints.description: MiCA intelligence score 0–100 with grade, breakdown, gaps, recommendations

endpoints.name: Products
endpoints.description: Paginated RWA product catalog with APY, TVL, chains, jurisdiction filters

endpoints.name: Jurisdictions
endpoints.description: Regulatory jurisdiction ranking by asset type, investor profile, timeline, budget

endpoints.name: Checklist
endpoints.description: 20+ compliance checklist items per asset type and jurisdiction

endpoints.name: Create Key
endpoints.description: Create free-tier API key (no auth required)

endpoints.name: Monitor (Premium)
endpoints.description: Create regulatory monitor — requires premium-tier API key (Bearer auros_pk_* with tier=premium). GET/DELETE /api/v1/monitor/:id for status and unsubscribe.

pricingTiers.name: Premium Monitor
pricingTiers.description: POST/GET/DELETE /api/v1/monitor — regulatory change alerts (requires premium API key)

pricingTiers.name: Pro
pricingTiers.description: Phase 3 — higher quota, webhooks, dossier sync (planned)

pricingTiers.name: Enterprise
pricingTiers.description: Custom SLA, dedicated support, on-prem options (contact sales)
